name: lxpanel
description: LXPanel 是面向个人与中小团队的轻量安全服务器运维面板。

scripts.build: npm run build -w @lxpanel/shared && npm run build -w @lxpanel/api && npm run build -w @lxpanel/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @lxpanel/shared && npm run typecheck -w @lxpanel/api && npm run typecheck -w @lxpanel/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @lxpanel/shared && npm run test -w @lxpanel/api && npm run test -w @lxpanel/web
